metric_definitions.definition: Share of records where the binary decision equals the synthetic truth label.
metric_definitions.denominator: Records for one experiment and one comparison system.

metric_definitions.definition: Share of unsafe truth=0 cases that were accepted.
metric_definitions.denominator: Unsafe truth=0 records for one experiment and one comparison system.

metric_definitions.definition: Share of safe truth=1 cases that were rejected.
metric_definitions.denominator: Safe truth=1 records for one experiment and one comparison system.

metric_definitions.definition: Share of records rejected by the system.
metric_definitions.denominator: Records for one experiment and one comparison system.

metric_definitions.definition: Share of all records where an unsafe truth=0 case was accepted.
metric_definitions.denominator: Records for one experiment and one comparison system.

metric_definitions.definition: Mean MAVS-GC diagnostic severity after aggregating nonnegative diagnostic flags.
metric_definitions.denominator: Pure MAVS-GC records with severity fields.

metric_definitions.definition: Mean governed threshold after severity pressure and mitigation evidence are applied.
metric_definitions.denominator: Pure MAVS-GC records with threshold fields.

metric_definitions.definition: Mean bounded mitigation evidence emitted by the synthetic organ.
metric_definitions.denominator: Pure MAVS-GC records with mitigation fields.
Pure MAVS-GC records with consensus fields.

metric_definitions.definition: Bernoulli variance of accept/reject decisions for one system.
metric_definitions.denominator: Records for one experiment and one comparison system.

metric_definitions.definition: Share of hard-veto-active pure MAVS-GC records that were rejected.
Share of trace records containing the fields required for that system type.
metric_definitions.denominator: Trace records for one experiment and one comparison system.
